0 images in DOM
Open Book Reader — lazy / infinite-scroll gallery demo
Open the image gallery (toolbar icon, or Alt+Shift+B), then scroll the gallery — it should prefetch the next batch before you reach the bottom. Or hit ⟳ Load all. This page only mounts ~12 images per scroll (like a real feed); a few use a tiny data-src placeholder to test lazy-URL rescue.
— end of feed —
